frames.narration: Window size = 4. Sender fires packets 0,1,2,3 without waiting for ACKs.
ACK 0 received. Window slides: now sending packets 1,2,3,4.
Packet 2 LOST in transit. Receiver discards out-of-order packets 3 and 4.
Timeout! Go-Back-N means we retransmit packet 2 AND all after it: 2, 3, 4, 5.
Retransmitting from packet 2. This is the inefficiency vs Selective Repeat.
